name: Water Sort Brain Puzzle
description: Pour, sort, and relax! Water Sort Puzzle is a casual, fun, and relaxing sorting game that brings you a splash of colorful excitement. If youre looking for a water puzzle to unwind with, this is the perfect pick. Sorting water might seem simple, but this addictive water sorting game will challenge your brain most delightfully. No timers, no pressure – just pure liquid sorting fun at your own pace. Dive into a world of vibrant liquids and calming soundscapes.
instructions: Use the mouse to play the game
